the highlighted section is: gobi desert

the gobi desert is one of the most famous tourist attractions in mongolia. it is a large desert that covers parts of northern and central mongolia. the gobi desert is known for its unique landscapes, including sand dunes, rocky mountains, and ancient ruins. it is also home to a variety of wildlife, including the elusive snow leopard and the rare goitered gazelle. in addition to its natural beauty, the gobi desert is also a popular destination for adventure seekers, who can enjoy activities such as hiking, camping, and off-road driving. other famous tourist attractions in mongolia include the capital city of ulan bator, the historical site of khan bair, and the sacred mountain of orkhon.
